previous_loop: V13 v0.2 was published as a Canon Freeze / Prototype-Bound Draft, and V13 LoopKit was created with use cases, field notes, V12 to V13 handoff discipline, field note type clarification, and prototype status.
residue: V13 Canon is fixed enough to test
V13 LoopKit exists as a minimal prototype
The V12 to V13 handoff path is documented
Field notes show that CAP is useful for preventing premature GO
The prototype has reduced unclear and too-heavy signals
The project has a stable current signal: proof continues, features pause, public exposure caps
next_variable: V13 v1.0 readiness criteria: define what evidence is required before v1.0 becomes valid.

re_entry_capacity.notes: The project can continue through prototype evidence without forcing a premature v1.0.

cap_or_recheck: Do not write V13 v1.0 yet. Recheck when there are 3 or more concrete real-task proofs, at least 1 non-repository use case, a clear pattern of when CAP is useful, a clear pattern of when HOLD is too vague, and evidence that the prompt is usable without explanation.
next_loop_command: Continue proof. Run V13 LoopKit on additional concrete AI-assisted tasks and collect readiness evidence before drafting V13 v1.0.
